prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-PARACORDBRACELETKIT-SOL Product Type: CORD_ROPE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Paracord Bracelet Making Kit with Buckles Assorted Solid Colors 10pc Description: An essential survival and everyday carry item, the ASR Outdoor 10' Assorted Solid Colors Paracord Bracelet Making Kit with Matching Buckles includes assorted solid colors of paracord rope in 10-foot lengths with matching colored buckles. The paracord itself features a 550 lbs pull capacity, a seven strand cord construction and can be used for everything from making survival bracelets and necklaces, to fishing stringers, repairs, emergency slings, and impromptu dog leashes to name just a few.
Hiking, trekking, camping, skiing, backpacking-whatever outdoor adventure activities you're into, this 550 paracord bracelet making kit is handy to have for a multitude of different purposes outside of just making survival bracelets:

-Hang clothes
-Repair broken equipment
-Emergency sling
-Dog collar or dog leash
-Emergency tourniquet
-Water bottle handle
-Fishing stringer or fishing line
-Keychains and lanyards
-Athletic shoe or hiking boot laces
-Function as a pulley
-Secure emergency shelter

Given its multi-functional nature, keep a bundle of this paracord in your boat, kayak, car, truck, tow, pull, lift, garage, workshop and toolbox for unforeseen mishaps or repairs; it's an essential item to have in your backpack, survival bag, camping gear, emergency preparedness kit or bug out bag. Search Terms: 550 paracord buckle craft kit army backpackpack adjustable plastic quick side release replacement paracord bracelet buckles webbing straps luggage pet collar multifunction tactical crafts accessories flat dual repair contoured Features: - PARACORD BRACELET KIT: An essential survival and everyday carry item, this paracord bracelet kit is a 10 piece set that includes assorted solid colors of paracord rope in ten foot lengths and matching colored buckles; the paracord itself features a 550 lbs pull capacity and a seven strand cord construction - SURVIVAL ESSENTIAL: Hiking, trekking, backpacking, skiing or camping, a paracord bracelet is an essential part of your survival kit, camping gear or bug out bag; it can assist with a multitude of tasks like hanging material, a fishing line or fishing stringer, a sling, an emergency tourniquet, help to make repairs, function as a pulley and so much more - MULTI PURPOSE: This 550 paracord, aside from being used a paracord bracelet making kit, can also be used for making necklaces, lanyards, keychains, paracord handles, shoe laces, hiking boot laces, water bottle handle, dog collars or dog leashes to name just a few; it's generally great to keep lose paracord handy on your boat, kayak, car, truck, tow, pull, lift, garage, workshop, tool box and backpack for unforeseen mishaps or repairs - FUN CHILDRENS ACTIVITY: If you're taking the family camping or leading a children's camp or outdoor school, this paracord bracelet making kit is a fun activity for young kids; the paracord kit is also great for girl and boy scout troops, schools and survival or camping clubs or groups - SPECIFICATIONS: Material: seven strand paracord; Product dimensions: 1 inch; Paracord length: 10 feet; Colors: solid assorted; Buckles: 10 units === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
